identity: Adult human male wandering mage/sage, about 30-35 years old, short brown hair, neat short brown beard, kind serious face.
outfit: Green hooded cloak open over a darker green long tunic, gray-silver shoulder mantle/cape draped across both shoulders, brown leather belt with small pouches at the chest, brown trousers, brown leather boots. NOT silver-haired, NOT old, NOT a graybeard, NOT armored.
weapons: Wooden quarterstaff, plain dark wood with no metal cap.
portraitStyle: Head-and-shoulders bust shot from mid-chest upward, three-quarter view facing slightly to camera-left. Hood down. Calm composed expression.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm idle. Quarterstaff held vertical at his right side.
eastStyle: Facing east (camera-right), calm idle. Quarterstaff held vertical, mantle visible over the trailing shoulder.

referenceSheet.note: East standing pose is the canonical reference — portrait was regenerated in M412 to match it after a drift was reported (silver-haired warlord vs the brown-haired green-cloaked sage).
